fullArticle:
In “AI Apocalypse” last week, we wrote about drivers behind the sharp selloff in AI-infrastructure names.

⚡️ AI Apocalypse ⚡️
Looks like we were right about institutions wanting better entry points in names like $MU, $SNDK, $AAOI, and $AXTI.https://t.co/pXCm4VkXWf

In that post, we also wrote that the evidence still showed the AI buildout was real:

The evidence still says the AI buildout is real. Memory, storage, optics, power, cooling, and data-center infrastructure remain bottlenecks. The better-positioned companies are generating rapidly ramping revenue and earnings from that demand.

This week, Penguin Solutions (PENG 0.00%↑) offered more evidence of that.

Most investors probably haven’t heard of Penguin. That’s part of why we like it.
